Class JavaFXGraphRenderer

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.ui.viewers.mathematics.discrete.backends.JavaFXGraphRenderer
All Implemented Interfaces:
GraphRenderer
public class JavaFXGraphRenderer extends Object implements GraphRenderer
High-performance JavaFX-based graph renderer. Features an interactive force-directed layout using Real precision.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
